description: Intensifying factor as a picture: IF = exposure without screens over exposure with screens, tall BARE bar vs short WITH-SCREENS bar feeding an IF ratio chip; right, LEAD FOIL card with crisp mini-radiograph (IF 2-4) vs FLUORESCENT phosphor card (IF 10-100) whose radiograph blooms soft with sideways light rays and mottle grain at 8s while the lead image stays crisp.
